result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Root command

Options:
  -m, --format <string>      Timestamp format [Default: @"o"]
  -z, --timezone <string>    Timezone identifier [Default: @"UTC"]

Commands:
  now                 Now command
  timezone            Timezone command
  timezone convert    Timezone convert command - Converts a datetime from one timezone to another
  unix                Unix command - Converts a datetime to Unix timestamp
  unix convert        Unix convert command - Converts a Unix timestamp to datetime

result.stdout:
Usage: timezone convert [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Timezone convert command - Converts a datetime from one timezone to another

Options:
  -d, --datetime <string>    Datetime to convert (parseable by DateTimeOffset) [Required]
  -f, --from <string>        Source timezone identifier [Required]
  -t, --to <string>          Target timezone identifier [Required]
  -m, --format <string>      Output timestamp format (default: 'o') [Default: @"o"]

commands.payload:
Usage: timezone convert [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Timezone convert command - Converts a datetime from one timezone to another

Options:
  -d, --datetime <string>    Datetime to convert (parseable by DateTimeOffset) [Required]
  -f, --from <string>        Source timezone identifier [Required]
  -t, --to <string>          Target timezone identifier [Required]
  -m, --format <string>      Output timestamp format (default: 'o') [Default: @"o"]

result.stdout:
Usage: unix [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Unix command - Converts a datetime to Unix timestamp

Options:
  -d, --datetime <string?>    Datetime to convert (parseable by DateTimeOffset). If not specified, uses current datetime. [Default: null]

commands.payload:
Usage: unix [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Unix command - Converts a datetime to Unix timestamp

Options:
  -d, --datetime <string?>    Datetime to convert (parseable by DateTimeOffset). If not specified, uses current datetime. [Default: null]

result.stdout:
Usage: unix convert [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Unix convert command - Converts a Unix timestamp to datetime

Arguments:
  [0] <long>    Unix timestamp (milliseconds) to convert

Options:
  -m, --format <string>    Output timestamp format (default: 'o') [Default: @"o"]
